concerns: Step 5: Adding .gitkeep placeholders in every directory is unnecessary — only create directories that will contain actual files in this ticket (src/app/, src/styles/, public/, tests/). The rest will be created naturally by future tickets.
Step 9: Consider also adding a `"type": "module"` field to package.json since the project uses ESNext modules and Vite expects this.

Risk acknowledgment: The plan correctly defers lint/test tooling, but the CLAUDE.md coding rules say to run `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run test` before completing any ticket. At minimum, add placeholder no-op scripts for `lint` and `test` so those commands don't fail if invoked.
